title: April 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 25''' is the 115th day of the year (116th in leap years). There are 250 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Cyril Nri]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Gina Torres]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 61|''Star Wars Weekly'' 61]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 45|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 45]] published.
*1992 – [[Adria Arjona]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Jedi]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: Watch Out, Jar Jar!]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: Anakin's Race for Freedom]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 29|''Star Wars'' (1998) 29]] published.
*2001 – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 4|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 4]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 53|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' 53]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Bea Arthur]] dies.
*[[2012]] – [[Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead 1|''Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead'' 1]] published.
*2012 – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 6|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 6]] published.
*2012 – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 5|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 5]] published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: Invasion Volume 3—Revelations]]'' trade paperback published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[The Adventures of Lanoree Brock, Je'daii Ranger]]'' published on the Kindle Daily Post website.
*[[2014]] – The [[Lucasfilm Story Group]] discontinues the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]].
*[[2018]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 19|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 19]] published.
*2018 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 15|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 15]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Frank Henson]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Return of the Jedi: A Collector's Classic Board Book]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' published in the United States.
<noinclude>
